definition: optical spectrometer operating in the near infrared or infrared spectral region that uses an interferometer and Fourier Transformation to measure the concentration of specific components

definition_ml.en: optical spectrometer operating in the near infrared or infrared spectral region that uses an interferometer and Fourier Transformation to measure the concentration of specific components
definition_ml.de: Optisches Spektrometer, das im nahen Infrarot- oder Infrarotspektralbereich arbeitet und mit Hilfe eines Interferometers und einer Fourier-Transformation die Konzentration bestimmter Komponenten misst

remark: also used by Process Automation - Device Information Model (PA-DIM)

remark_ml.en: also used by Process Automation - Device Information Model (PA-DIM)
